topic: A person tying a Bowline knot with a thick rope, hands-only close-up.

parsed_generation.script: Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Macro close-up; hands on thick rope, form small loop.\nScene 2 — Action (2-5s): Side view; free end wraps around standing part and back through loop.\nScene 3 — Close (5-8s): Macro close-up; tighten knot, ends lie neat, bowline completed.
parsed_generation.narration: Bowline knot inside a thick rope creates a fixed loop that won’t slip. The close-up emphasizes precise hand placement and tension for a strong hold. The final frame shows a clean, tight bowline ready for use.

feedback: The concept stays on topic, but one Scene (the side-view) contradicts the 'hands-only close-up' constraint.
